title: Design shared BLE advertising/service owner for native and Meshtastic app surfaces
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.4 intentionally made the Meshtastic BLE app-compat surface mutually exclusive with the existing native LICHEN NUS/SLIP BLE service so the first implementation has one advertising owner and one app session. This blocks simultaneous native direct-BLE LCI and Meshtastic compatibility over BLE on the same firmware image. What needs to be done: design a shared Zephyr BLE owner that composes advertising data/scan response, connection policy, CCC/session state, and service registration for native LICHEN BLE and Meshtastic BLE without double-starting advertising or corrupting per-client queues. Acceptance criteria: architecture is recorded in Beads design/notes; Kconfig policy for coexistence versus product modes is explicit; implementation Beads are created for code movement if needed; T-Deck/R1/R1 Neo assumptions remain below board/app config boundaries.
